message:
feat: QueryMode Studio — data explorer UI with vinext

Three-panel workspace like Localflare:
- Schema sidebar: browse tables/columns from R2 metadata, click to insert
- CodeMirror editor: write DataFrame or SQL queries, Cmd+Enter to run
- Results panel: live data table with stats (rows, bytes, duration)
- Sources tab: browse/upload/delete R2 datasets

Service binding to querymode engine (zero HTTP hop).
